hooks.summary: Block credential-like content written into .better-work/test/ paths.

bindings.note: Bash path: scans command text for explicit credential-like literals when the command writes into .better-work/test/; external file copies remain outside this guard.

Write path: runtime-verified on codex-cli 0.125.0. Built-in file edits surface as matcher Write with tool_name apply_patch; the guard scans added patch lines for credential-like literals targeting .better-work/test/.
Bash path: blocks shell write targets that resolve to feedback-rules.json.
Write path: runtime-verified on codex-cli 0.125.0. Built-in apply_patch edits are blocked when they target feedback-rules.json.

hooks.summary: Append every shell command and output to execution-log.md for L2 audit.
Inject post-completion checklist after results.json is written.

bindings.note: Bash path: infers shell write targets and emits checklist additionalContext after commands that write results.json under .better-work/test/.
Write path: runtime-verified on codex-cli 0.125.0. Built-in apply_patch writes to results.json emit the same checklist additionalContext.

hooks.summary: Validate results.json fields + evidence semantics + pass-evidence-check (compare baseline, assertion_value, pre_existing contradiction).

bindings.note: Bash path: re-reads results.json after shell writes and emits validation warnings via additionalContext.
Write path: runtime-verified on codex-cli 0.125.0. Built-in apply_patch writes to results.json emit the same validation warnings via additionalContext.

hooks.summary: Protect project-level derived views unless merge lockfile is present.

bindings.note: Bash path: blocks shell write targets that resolve into protected project-level derived views.
Write path: runtime-verified on codex-cli 0.125.0. Built-in apply_patch edits are blocked when they target protected derived views.

hooks.summary: Require tester registration artifacts before strategy-plan.md is accepted.

bindings.note: Bash path: checks strategy-plan.md writes after shell commands and emits registration warnings via additionalContext.
Write path: runtime-verified on codex-cli 0.125.0. Built-in apply_patch writes to strategy-plan.md emit the same registration warnings via additionalContext.

hooks.summary: Prevent testers from writing into other testers' run directories.

bindings.note: Bash path: enforcement depends on a session file keyed to the current Codex Bash parent PID.
Write path: runtime-verified on codex-cli 0.125.0 for built-in apply_patch. Enforcement still depends on the same session file contract keyed to the hook parent PID.

hooks.summary: [PLANNED] Verify daemon port binding after startup. Too project-specific for skill-level hook; projects should add their own.

claude.note: Requires project-specific daemon binary/port patterns. Not implementable as generic skill hook.

hooks.summary: [PLANNED] Scan summary/report for numeric claims without source references. Automated detection has unacceptable false-positive rate; enforced via L4 templates quality standards instead.

claude.note: Distinguishing 'numeric claim' from 'step number' requires NLP-level analysis. Better as template standard.

hooks.summary: [PLANNED] Periodically verify canary/sampler health during 24h+ long-run tests. No Cron/periodic trigger in hook lifecycle; handled by L6 procedures/longrun-testing.md via agent instructions.

claude.note: CronCreate exists for prompts but not hooks. No session-idle or periodic-tick lifecycle event.
